description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray concrete or stucco, accented by sections of reddish-brown paneling and large glass windows. The front facade includes a prominent glass entryway with a covered porch area, flanked by landscaped greenery and trees. The structure appears to have multiple open-air terraces and balconies, some with wooden slat railings, providing outdoor living spaces. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall layout suggests a spacious, multi-room interior with a blend of open and enclosed spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with light gray walls, large glass windows, and reddish-brown accents, featuring terraces and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass entryway, covered porch, and landscaped trees on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid gray wall with minimal windows and a large tree near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back terraces, rooftop features, and a more private, enclosed facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible balconies, a mix of window sizes, and a driveway or paved area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, covered porch, and landscaped approach with minimal decorative elements.
